vBRIEFInfo.description: Extend spec_render.py to walk lifecycle folders and render scope vBRIEFs under an Implementation Plan section.

plan.title: spec rendering does not aggregate scope vBRIEFs from lifecycle folders (v0.20 model)

narratives.Problem: task spec:render reads only the single specification.vbrief.json file. In v0.20 the project spec is the union of that file plus scope vBRIEFs in vbrief/pending/, active/, completed/. Today SPECIFICATION.md shows only intent; scopes are invisible to readers.
narratives.Action: Add --include-scopes flag (default on) to scripts/spec_render.py. Walk vbrief/pending/ and vbrief/active/, and optionally vbrief/completed/ with status pins, emitting an Implementation Plan section grouped by lifecycle bucket. Each scope renders as filename stem + title + summary narrative, with acceptance items listed. Use the #458 bilingual edge reader for cross-scope topo-sort ordering.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_spec_render.py: fixture with pending + active + completed scope vBRIEFs asserts rendered output contains Implementation Plan heading and each bucket sub-heading with entries. Assert --include-scopes=off falls back to pre-aggregator behavior.
narratives.Outcome: SPECIFICATION.md is complete for any v0.20+ project -- intent narratives plus every lifecycle-folder scope. The staleness/auto-render hooks (#398) finally produce meaningful output for v0.20 users.

items.title: Walk vbrief/pending/, active/, completed/ and load scope vBRIEFs
Emit Implementation Plan section grouped by lifecycle bucket
Use #458 bilingual edge reader for cross-scope topo-sort
